Execution result :
: The claim states that a building on U.S. Route 83 was constructed in 1911 and added to the National Register of Historic Places on 22 November 1988. The triple sets provide information that the Asher and Mary Isabelle Richardson House, located on U.S. Route 83, was added to the National Register of Historic Places on 22 November 1988. However, there is no information in the triple sets about the construction year of the Asher and Mary Isabelle Richardson House or any other building on U.S. Route 83.

************************************Iteration:9***********************************

Additionally, the Asher and Mary Isabelle Richardson House was added to the National Register of Historic Places on November 22, 1988. Therefore, based on the gathered information, the claim that a building constructed in 1911 on U.S. Route 83 was registered as a historic site on November 22, 1988, is True.
